Interface ILasPointInfo2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.GeoDatabaseExtensions
Assembly
ESRI.Server.GeoDatabaseExtensions.dll

Provides access to LAS point information.

[Guid("E0DDAEE9-E87B-44CF-9170-0252214CAFA5")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface ILasPointInfo2 : ILasPointInfo
